# setNominalSampleRate(_:)

**Instance Method**

Set the nominalSampleRate property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setNominalSampleRate(_ sampleRate: Double) throws
```

## Parameters

- **sampleRate**: A Double that indicates the current nominal sample rate of the device.
title: setNominalSampleRate(_:)
